allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); missing=[x['id'] for x in d if not x.get\('remySensory'\)]; print\(f'Total: {len\(d\)}, missing remySensory: {len\(missing\)}'\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/dishes.json'\); const missing=d.filter\(x=>!x.remySensory\); console.log\('Total:',d.length,'Missing remySensory:',missing.length\); const noChef=d.filter\(x=>x.chef===null\).map\(x=>x.id\); console.log\('No chef:',noChef.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/edges.json'\); const noReason=d.filter\(x=>!x.reason\); console.log\('Total edges:',d.length,'Missing reason:',noReason.length, noReason.map\(x=>x.source+' → '+x.target\)\);")
